title: pronephrium heterophyllum
intro: Pronephrium heterophyllum is a species of fern in the family Mariaceae, native to Southeast Asia, known for its medicinal and culinary uses. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds. Consuming Pronephrium heterophyllum in moderation can provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and is also used in traditional medicine for treating various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
